content:
You are a governance and resource derivation agent. Given a frozen Stage 1 decomposition and frozen Stage 2 interfaces, your task is to derive resource allocation and governance fields for each child.

RULES:
1. You MUST NOT change Stage 1 semantics (purpose, behavior, boundary, preconditions, postconditions, guarantees, composition_role) or Stage 2 interfaces (call_inputs, internal_leaf_accesses, outputs, signature).
2. You MUST NOT add, delete, rename, or reorder children.
3. Derive ONLY governance/resource fields.
4. Use Stage2 internal_leaf_accesses as the primary source for resource fields.
5. global_vars and data_operations must be synchronized.
6. If a child has data_operations over a resource, global_vars must contain the same resource/op, unless governance_notes explains a deliberate exception.

OUTPUT FORMAT — Return valid JSON:
{
  "children": [
    {
      "name": "UNCHANGED",
      "purpose": "UNCHANGED from Stage 1",
      "behavior": "UNCHANGED from Stage 1",
      "boundary": {"in_scope": ["UNCHANGED"], "out_of_scope": ["UNCHANGED"]},
      "preconditions": ["UNCHANGED"],
      "postconditions": ["UNCHANGED"],
      "guarantees": ["UNCHANGED"],
      "composition_role": "UNCHANGED",
      "call_inputs": ["UNCHANGED from Stage 2"],
      "internal_leaf_accesses": ["UNCHANGED from Stage 2"],
      "outputs": ["UNCHANGED from Stage 2"],
      "signature": "UNCHANGED from Stage 2",
      "global_vars": [
        {"variable": "resource", "op": "read|write|read_write", "description": "what operation"}
      ],
      "data_operations": [
        {"source_name": "resource", "operation_type": "read|write|read_write", "description": "what operation"}
      ],
      "requested_capabilities": ["resource.operation"],
      "constraints": [{"constraint_id": "C-001", "description": "constraint"}],
      "acceptance_criteria": [{"ac_id": "AC-001", "description": "criterion"}],
      "traceability": {"parent_requirement_ids": ["FR-001"]},
      "node_type": "pure_function|atomic_operation",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    }
  ],
  "governance_notes": "notes for validator/codegen",
  "resource_audit": {
    "signature_preservation_detail": "explain no signature changed",
    "internal_leaf_mapping_detail": "explain how internal_leaf_accesses map to resources",
    "global_vars_data_operations_sync_detail": "explain synchronization",
    "coverage_detail": "explain resource coverage",
    "final_status": "ok | needs_attention"
  }
}

Derive governance and resource fields for each child.

Parent: ChatApp
Purpose: Handle real-time messaging operations

Parent inputs: input: Any - JSON with command (send/history/create_channel/join)
Parent outputs: output: Any - JSON with success, data, message

Available Data Stores:
  - messages (memory, read_write)
  - channels (memory, read_write)

Children (frozen from Stage 1 + Stage 2):
  ParseCommand: Parse the input JSON to extract command and parameters
    signature: def ParseCommand(input: dict) -> tuple[str, dict]
    call_inputs: [{"name": "input", "type": "dict", "description": "Raw JSON input from parent", "source": "parent input"}]
    outputs: [{"name": "command", "type": "str", "description": "Command type", "consumer": "parent"}, {"name": "params", "type": "dict", "description": "Command parameters", "consumer": "parent"}]
  ValidateSendMessage: Validate send message parameters and user membership
    signature: def ValidateSendMessage(params: dict) -> tuple[bool, str]
    call_inputs: [{"name": "params", "type": "dict", "description": "Parameters with user, channel, message", "source": "previous child output"}]
    internal_leaf_accesses: [{"resource": "channels", "op": "read", "reason": "Check user membership in channel"}]
    outputs: [{"name": "valid", "type": "bool", "description": "Whether validation passed", "consumer": "parent"}, {"name": "error", "type": "str", "description": "Error message if invalid", "consumer": "parent"}]
  SaveMessage: Save a message to the messages store
    signature: def SaveMessage(params: dict) -> bool
    call_inputs: [{"name": "params", "type": "dict", "description": "Parameters with user, channel, message", "source": "previous child output"}]
    internal_leaf_accesses: [{"resource": "messages", "op": "read_write", "reason": "Append message and trim history"}]
    outputs: [{"name": "success", "type": "bool", "description": "Whether save succeeded", "consumer": "parent"}]
  GetHistory: Retrieve message history for a channel
    signature: def GetHistory(params: dict) -> list
    call_inputs: [{"name": "params", "type": "dict", "description": "Parameters with channel", "source": "previous child output"}]
    internal_leaf_accesses: [{"resource": "messages", "op": "read", "reason": "Retrieve messages for channel"}]
    outputs: [{"name": "history", "type": "list", "description": "List of message dicts", "consumer": "parent"}]
  CreateChannel: Create a new channel
    signature: def CreateChannel(params: dict) -> bool
    call_inputs: [{"name": "params", "type": "dict", "description": "Parameters with channel name", "source": "previous child output"}]
    internal_leaf_accesses: [{"resource": "channels", "op": "read_write", "reason": "Check existence and add channel"}]
    outputs: [{"name": "success", "type": "bool", "description": "Whether channel was created", "consumer": "parent"}]
  JoinChannel: Add user to a channel
    signature: def JoinChannel(params: dict) -> bool
    call_inputs: [{"name": "params", "type": "dict", "description": "Parameters with user and channel", "source": "previous child output"}]
    internal_leaf_accesses: [{"resource": "channels", "op": "read_write", "reason": "Check membership and add user"}]
    outputs: [{"name": "success", "type": "bool", "description": "Whether join succeeded", "consumer": "parent"}]
  BuildResponse: Build the output JSON response
    signature: def BuildResponse(success: bool, data: any, message: str) -> dict
    call_inputs: [{"name": "success", "type": "bool", "description": "Success flag", "source": "previous child output"}, {"name": "data", "type": "any", "description": "Data payload", "source": "previous child output"
    outputs: [{"name": "output", "type": "dict", "description": "Final JSON response", "consumer": "parent"}]

Return ONLY the JSON response.
